name: Mauricio "Shogun" Rua
winProfile: 1 Elite+ wins, 3 Top-5+ wins, 6 ranked quality wins.
shortCase: A real UFC champion with major wins over Machida, Liddell, Griffin, and Henderson, but an 11-12-1 UFC record.
bestArgument: Rua knocked out an undefeated Lyoto Machida for the title and beat several former champions during a long UFC career.
counterArgument: He never defended the title and finished 11-12-1 in the UFC. His legendary PRIDE résumé is historical context only and cannot raise the UFC-only score.
whyRankedHere: Rua knocked out an undefeated Lyoto Machida for the title and beat several former champions during a long UFC career.
whyNotHigher: He never defended the title and finished 11-12-1 in the UFC. His legendary PRIDE résumé is historical context only and cannot raise the UFC-only score.
finalTakeaway: A real UFC champion with major wins over Machida, Liddell, Griffin, and Henderson, but an 11-12-1 UFC record.
